summary: Backend API Testing - Iteration 15 COMPLETE. 12/13 tests PASS, 1 SKIPPED. All Community Avatar features verified working. Feature 2A, 2B, 2B Security, and 2E all pass. Regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Feature 2A: GET /api/communities returns avatar_url field for communities that have one set
✓ Feature 2B: POST /api/admin/communities/{id}/avatar accepts base64 image upload, saves file, updates community.avatar_url, returns {url, message}
✓ Feature 2B: Invalid base64 returns 400, non-existent community returns 404
✓ Feature 2B Security: Non-admin users get 403 Forbidden
✓ Feature 2B Security: Unauthenticated requests get 401 Unauthorized
✓ Feature 2E: GET /api/communities/me includes avatar_url when user is in a community with avatar
✓ Feature 2E: GET /api/admin/communities includes avatar_url for each community
Note: Communities without avatar_url don't have the field in MongoDB (undefined, not null) - this is acceptable behavior, frontend handles with fallback icon

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests pass, 1 skipped due to admin not being in a community initially)
success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test user created with prefix 'TEST_AvatarUser_' for non-admin security testing. Avatar uploaded to community 'First Community 7a3574' (id: dc5f2c0e-6ab2-488c-bb2e-abf6de068c98).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Community Avatar feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/admin/communities/{id}/avatar (admin only, base64 upload), GET /api/communities (includes avatar_url), GET /api/communities/{id} (includes avatar_url), GET /api/communities/me (includes avatar_url), GET /api/admin/communities (includes avatar_url). Communities without avatar have undefined avatar_url field (not null). Known community with avatar: 'First Community 7a3574' (id: dc5f2c0e-6ab2-488c-bb2e-abf6de068c98).

features_verified.feature_2a_list_communities_avatar_url: PASS - GET /api/communities returns avatar_url for communities that have one
features_verified.feature_2b_admin_upload_success: PASS - POST /api/admin/communities/{id}/avatar works with base64 image
features_verified.feature_2e_get_my_community: SKIPPED (admin not in community) - Manually verified: GET /api/communities/me includes avatar_url when user is in community
features_verified.known_community_avatar: PASS - Community 'First Community 7a3574' has avatar_url set

manual_verification.get_communities_me_with_avatar: Manually tested by joining community with avatar, verified avatar_url is returned in GET /api/communities/me response, then left community to restore state
